    Serialized Form

    • Package com.common

      • Class com.common.Request

        class Request extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • args
            Map<String,Object> args
            Additional arguments for the command. Used for commands that need parameters (e.g., remove_by_id needs id)
          • command
            String command
            The command name to execute on server. Used only when type is COMMAND (e.g., "show", "info", "add")
          • data
            Serializable data
            Data payload for commands that need objects. Used for sending MusicBand objects in add/add_if_min commands, or for sending updated MusicBand in update command. This field is Serializable so it can be sent over the network.
          • type
            Request.RequestType type
            The type of request - determines how server will process it. Can be COMMAND, HEALTH, FILE_UPLOAD, or FILE_DOWNLOAD

      • Class com.common.Response

        class Response extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • data
            Serializable data
            Data payload for commands that need to return objects. Used for update command - returns existing MusicBand so client can show current values and let user modify them. This field is Serializable so it can be sent over the network.
          • error
            String error
            Error message (if request failed). Contains description of what went wrong.
          • result
            String result
            The result of the request (if successful). For COMMAND type, this contains the command output. For HEALTH type, this contains "OK" string.
          • stats
            ServerStats stats
            Server statistics (only used for HEALTH requests). Contains uptime, memory usage, connection count, etc.
          • success
            boolean success
            Whether the request was successful. True if server processed request without errors.

      • Class com.common.ServerStats

        class ServerStats extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • activeConnections
            int activeConnections
            Number of currently connected clients
          • collectionSize
            int collectionSize
            Number of music bands in the collection
          • freeMemory
            long freeMemory
            Amount of free memory in bytes (from JVM)
          • isHealthy
            boolean isHealthy
            Whether the server is healthy (true if running)
          • startTime
            LocalDateTime startTime
            When the server started
          • totalMemory
            long totalMemory
            Total amount of memory in bytes (from JVM)
          • uptimeMillis
            long uptimeMillis
            How long server has been running in milliseconds
          • usedMemory
            long usedMemory
            Amount of used memory in bytes (total - free)

    • Package com.model

      • Class com.model.Album

        class Album extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • name
            String name
            The name of the album. Cannot be null and cannot be empty.
          • sales
            Double sales
            The total sales figure for the album. Cannot be null and must be greater than 0.

      • Class com.model.Coordinates

        class Coordinates extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • x
            Long x
            The x coordinate. Maximum value is 554. Cannot be null.
          • y
            Integer y
            The y coordinate. Maximum value is 782. Cannot be null.

      • Class com.model.MusicBand

        class MusicBand extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • bestAlbum
            Album bestAlbum
            The best album of the music band. Cannot be null.
          • coordinates
            Coordinates coordinates
            The coordinates of the music band. Cannot be null.
          • creationDate
            Date creationDate
            The date when the music band was created. Cannot be null. Generated automatically.
          • description
            String description
            The description of the music band. Can be null.
          • genre
            MusicGenre genre
            The genre of the music band. Can be null.
          • id
            long id
            Unique identifier for the music band. Must be greater than 0 and must be unique. Generated automatically.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the music band. Cannot be null and cannot be empty.
          • numberOfParticipants
            Integer numberOfParticipants
            The number of participants in the band. Cannot be null and must be greater than 0.
